<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get triggers status"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/triggers/status/{camera_name}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Gets the status of all triggers for a specific camera.
    Returns a success message or an error if the camera is not found.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

  parameters={[{"name":"camera_name","in":"path","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","title":"Camera Name"}}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

  body={undefined}
>
